parameters.name: finish

schema.title: Finish

parameters.description: Accepted input values: normal, nonfoil, foil, etched. Canonical response values: normal, foil, etched. The input alias `nonfoil` is normalized to `normal`.

parameters.name: lang

schema.description: Catalog search language filter. Recommended codes include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Search currently accepts the raw stored catalog language codes.
schema.title: Lang

parameters.description: Catalog search language filter. Recommended codes include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Search currently accepts the raw stored catalog language codes.

schema.title: Response Cards Search Cards Search Get
Response Card Names Search Cards Search Names Get

parameters.name: lang

schema.description: Catalog search language filter. Recommended codes include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Search currently accepts the raw stored catalog language codes. Omit this parameter to prefer English printings by default. Use `all` to include every available catalog language.
schema.title: Lang

parameters.description: Catalog search language filter. Recommended codes include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Search currently accepts the raw stored catalog language codes. Omit this parameter to prefer English printings by default. Use `all` to include every available catalog language.

schema.title: Response Card Printings Lookup Cards Oracle  Oracle Id  Printings Get

parameters.name: finish

schema.description: Accepted input values: normal, nonfoil, foil, etched. Canonical response values: normal, foil, etched. The input alias `nonfoil` is normalized to `normal`.
schema.title: Finish

parameters.description: Accepted input values: normal, nonfoil, foil, etched. Canonical response values: normal, foil, etched. The input alias `nonfoil` is normalized to `normal`.

parameters.name: condition_code

schema.description: Canonical condition codes: M, NM, LP, MP, HP, DMG. Default: NM. Human-readable aliases such as `near mint` and `lightly played` are accepted and normalized.
schema.title: Condition Code

parameters.description: Canonical condition codes: M, NM, LP, MP, HP, DMG. Default: NM. Human-readable aliases such as `near mint` and `lightly played` are accepted and normalized.

parameters.name: language_code

schema.description: Canonical language codes: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Default: en. Common language-name aliases such as `english` and `japanese` are accepted and normalized.
schema.title: Language Code

parameters.description: Canonical language codes: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Default: en. Common language-name aliases such as `english` and `japanese` are accepted and normalized.

lang.title: Lang
lang.description: Catalog search language filter. Recommended codes include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Search currently accepts the raw stored catalog language codes.

condition_code.title: Condition Code
condition_code.description: Canonical condition codes: M, NM, LP, MP, HP, DMG. Default: NM. Human-readable aliases such as `near mint` and `lightly played` are accepted and normalized.

finish.title: Finish
finish.description: Accepted input values: normal, nonfoil, foil, etched. Canonical response values: normal, foil, etched. The input alias `nonfoil` is normalized to `normal`.

language_code.title: Language Code
language_code.description: Canonical language codes: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. When omitted, the added inventory row inherits the resolved printing language. Common language-name aliases such as `english` and `japanese` are accepted and normalized.

finish.title: Finish
finish.description: Canonical finish values: normal, foil, etched.

condition_code.title: Condition Code
condition_code.description: Canonical condition codes: M, NM, LP, MP, HP, DMG. Stored rows are normally normalized to these values.

language_code.description: Canonical language codes: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph. Stored rows are normally normalized to these values.

available_languages.title: Available Languages
available_languages.description: Catalog language codes available for the matched card. Common values include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph.

lang.description: Catalog language code. Common values include: en, ja, de, fr, it, es, pt, ru, ko, zhs, zht, ph.

finish.title: Finish
finish.description: Accepted input values: normal, nonfoil, foil, etched. Canonical response values: normal, foil, etched. The input alias `nonfoil` is normalized to `normal`.

condition_code.title: Condition Code
condition_code.description: Canonical condition codes: M, NM, LP, MP, HP, DMG. Default: NM. Human-readable aliases such as `near mint` and `lightly played` are accepted and normalized.

merge.title: Merge
merge.description: Only applies to location or condition changes. When true, a collision with an existing row is merged instead of returning a conflict.

keep_acquisition.title: Keep Acquisition
keep_acquisition.description: Only applies to merged location or condition changes. Choose whether the merged row keeps the target row or source row acquisition metadata.

PatchInventoryItemRequest.title: PatchInventoryItemRequest
PatchInventoryItemRequest.description: Specify exactly one mutation family per request: quantity, finish, location, condition_code, notes, tags, or acquisition. PATCH does not currently support true multi-field updates in one request.
